title: Refusal in a turn emits aep.refusal_recorded and terminates the run with StopReason.refused
description: When the driver detects a refusal-flavored signal (Anthropic stop_reason=refusal, OpenAI content_filter, Gemini SAFETY/BLOCKLIST/etc.), the runner MUST emit one aep.refusal_recorded event carrying aep.refusal.reason (provider's verbatim code), optional aep.refusal.message, optional aep.refusal.category, and optional aep.refusal.provider — then terminate with aep.agent_stopped where aep.reason='refused'. The refused turn MUST NOT be appended to history (so a higher-level supervisor can choose to reset and retry without re-feeding the refusal). This is the wire signal a supervisor relies on to count refusals and distinguish them from converged or budget-exhausted runs.
